task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient record for Michael Audit.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific 'Vitals' encounter on Jan 01, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the patient's encounter list or visits page with a 'Vitals' encounter dated '01 Jan 2024' (or '2024-01-01') visible.

task_completion.description: Open the edit or reassignment screen for the target encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the edit encounter screen, provider reassignment dialog, or encounter details page in edit mode for the Vitals encounter.

task_completion.description: Input or select 'Cordelia Clinician' as the new provider.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the encounter is now assigned to the correct provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the saved encounter details or the patient's encounter list, explicitly listing 'Cordelia Clinician' as the provider for the Vitals encounter on Jan 01, 2024.

integrity.description: Agent used the EMR graphical user interface to perform the reassignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the EMR system's UI, not a terminal window executing cURL or API commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual EMR web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard web application with proper navigation menus, buttons, and layout, rather than a text editor or static HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database administration tools to alter the record directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots of phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or similar database management tools are present.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Michael Audit. Target Provider: Cordelia Clinician. Encounter Date: 2024-01-01 (may appear as 01 Jan 2024). Encounter Type: Vitals. The VLM should verify that the provider for this specific encounter is changed from 'Super User' to 'Cordelia Clinician'.
